subcodes.first_line: The Kingdom of praise and the Realm of glorification beseemeth and befitteth that omnipotent Sovereign, Whose dominion and majesty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ملکوت حمد و جبروت ثنا سلطان مقتدری را لایق و سزا که سطوت عالم و شوکت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
